revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=7%E6%9C%88%E3%81%AE%E7%94%BB%E5%83%8F%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E4%BE%9D%E9%A0%BC here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
